test.notes: All 40 contract/repo tests passed, 69 browser-use-discovery tests passed

typecheck.notes: All 17 JS files passed syntax check

appliedUpdates.description: Documented COPIES comment pattern requiring manual propagation of shared helpers to 6 wizard script locations
Documented discovery wizard spec at docs/DISCOVERY-SETUP-WIZARD-SPEC.md describes multi-phase wizard build plan

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: workers should verify the commit they reference in handoffs matches the actual feature work, not just the most recent commit
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery (round 1) referenced commit ac86145 which was a different feature (security refactor). Round 2 correctly references cf9aa04.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: when a feature's verificationSteps list specific manual browser exercises, the handoff must document which exercises were performed and the results, not just 'opened browser'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery verificationSteps specify 5 specific manual exercise categories. Round 2 review noted code is complete but detailed manual exercises not explicitly documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: discovery wizard implementation should address all VAL assertions listed in the feature's fulfills field and any referenced cross-area assertions (VAL-CROSS-*)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 1 found VAL-CROSS-006 and VAL-CROSS-012 appeared unaddressed. Round 2 confirmed these were addressed in commits 4e8a484 (grounded_web opt-out) and related wizard state persistence work.
